installation_requirements.flush_mount_note: Installed recessed in a pit, lift invisible when not in use
installation_requirements.concrete_requirements: Heavy-duty floor capable of supporting load

specifications.pivot_pins: Chrome-plated pivot pins with maintenance-free operation
specifications.safety_latch_material: Laser cut high strength T-1 steel

features: 63 inches of lifting height with completely unobstructed under-vehicle access
Heaviest-built parallelogram lift in the world
Large 7.75-inch hydraulic cylinders reduce operating pressure
No obstructive tie bar between runways
Computer-controlled synchronization programmable for different lift heights
Dual high-resolution chain-driven encoders monitor 60 times per second
Surface, flush, or recessed pit mounting
Available in fully galvanized steel for wash bay environments
Laser cut high strength T-1 steel safety latch racks

optional_equipment.description: Wheels-free service for brakes, tires, and axles

certifications: Manufactured in compliance with ALI, ANSI, ASME, AISI, ASTM, ASA, NEC, AWG, NEMA
safety_features: Dual high-resolution chain-driven encoders monitor lift 60 times per second
Hydraulic safeties with pressure-compensated flow control valves
Laser cut high strength T-1 steel safety latch racks
notes: Heaviest-built parallelogram lift in the world per manufacturer
Flush-mounted version is invisible when not in use
